rationale: The cited paper is a major meta-analytic benchmark on short- and long-term brand advertising elasticities (including recession effects), and the citing paper’s core question is how brand-level advertising (and price) elasticities vary across expansions/contractions. This is strong topical and construct overlap, suggesting likely use as a foundational comparison/source rather than an incidental mention; the match is also a direct DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.3.457).
